PreparerPersonGrp.PreparerPersonNm: BRIAN E VAN CAMP CPA MTAX

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: A partnership of nonprofit groups devoted to improving the quality of life throughout Montana.
IRS990.MissionDesc: A partnership of nonprofit groups devoted to improving the quality of life throughout Montana.
IRS990.Desc: TRAINING and TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE:Provide technical assistance, training and coordination of activities in communities and at work places, including electronic pledging campaigns, that in turn support the work of Montana Shares and our member groups serving Montanans.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: GRANTS TO NONPROFITS: Montana Shares conducts an annual payroll contribution campaign to support the member organizations of our federation. Employees at the work sites have the option of designating their contributions to any of the member groups, to Montana Shares for work with our members, or all of the member groups, or leaving it undesignated.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: CAMPAIGNS:Support for our members on a year-round basis.

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Big Brothers Big Sisters of MT
Friends of the MO Breaks Monumen
Heart of the Valley Animal Shelt

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section A, Line 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The organization consists of members that are elected by the current members and at-large members elected by the current members.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 11b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The Form 990 is electronically submitted to all council members and members of the finance/audit committee for review and comment prior to filing.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 12c
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: The conflict of interest policy and disclosure statements are provided to all staff upon hiring and to all council members annually in the fall. The signed statements are reviewed by the Executive Committee for any conflicts. Any individual who has a conflict during the course of the year must disclose the conflict or potential conflict and recuse him/herself from voting on the matter at issue.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section B, Line 15a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: In accordance with policy, the Executive Committee reviews compensation for the past year and proposed compensation in the budget for the Executive Director. This and other positions were compared with wage and benefits salary survey of the Montana Nonprofit Association for adequacy and comparability before wages and benefits were finalized. This occurs at least annually.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Section C, Line 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: All governing documents are available upon request. Additionally, thefinancial statements and Form 990 are available on our website.
